item.title: Return of the Meme: 1478 (chainmail booty shorts)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I wonder how the ranking is going to be determined.
I dreamed of being stuck on an island in a lake for the winter, abandoned by my parents, though I still had the car. And my roman reenactment gear. Also, I was about 16 at the time. Eventually got rescued but it was pretty close after that big snowstorm came.
Love me some Milo.
So many people in Sedona think Sedona is like this.
I always love seeing jumping spiders.
Or me, dissociating, wondering if I'll be rescuing a bird of prey from the side of the road next. I won't lie, I'd love to be a falconer with a Kestrel or a Merlin. (Yes, that is a small falcon.)
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "What are you doing?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: What's next, Mickey? Thought crimes?
item.description: The canceling of Jimmy Kimmel is another nail in the coffin of American democracy. I suggest we all fight with our wallets. Money is the only thing fascist oligarchs really believe in.

item.title: GovBrief Today #230
item.description: Horst Ludwig Georg Erich Wessel (1907-1930), a young brownshirt in the early Nazi movement, was shot by Communist opponents during a dispute and later died from his injuries. Joseph Goebbels and the Nazi propaganda machine mythologized his life and death, elevating him into a martyr for their cause. A poem he wrote became the “Horst-Wessel Song,” the anthem of the Nazi Party and later part of the national identity under Nazi rule. Through public ceremonies, renamed streets, and ritual remembrance, Wessel’s story became a blueprint for turning death into myth and myth into political power. Don’t rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what’s going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-pittsburgh-car-attack [2] https://go.govbrief.today/vet-flag-burning-pleads [3] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-antifa-designation [4] https://go.govbrief.today/uk-state-visit-banquet [5] https://go.govbrief.today/former-cdc-director-testifies [6] https://go.govbrief.today/prisoners-still-in-ghana [7] https://go.govbrief.today/portland-ice-detention-limit [8] https://go.govbrief.today/mahmoud-khalil-deportation-case [9] https://go.govbrief.today/cdc-telework-disability-ends [10] https://go.govbrief.today/court-redraw-jefferson-county [11] https://go.govbrief.today/jimmy-kimmel-live-pulled [12] https://go.govbrief.today/ilhan-omar-censure-blocked [13] https://go.govbrief.today/fed-cut-quarter-point [14] https://go.govbrief.today/dc-takeover-guard-expense [15] https://go.govbrief.today/bessent-mortgage-pledge-cook [16] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-ssa-database-denial [17] https://go.govbrief.today/education-conservative-collab-civics [18] https://go.govbrief.today/dems-epstein-bank-subpoena [19] https://go.govbrief.today/lawmakers-security-boost-10k [20] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-frustrated-anthropic-limits [21] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-celebrates-kimmel-suspension [22] https://go.govbrief.today/endangerment-finding-academy-epa Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
